content: Beta blocker selection and dosing depends on indication and patient characteristics. For heart failure: carvedilol starting 3.125mg BID, target 25mg BID; metoprolol succinate starting 12.5-25mg daily, target 200mg daily; bisoprolol starting 1.25mg daily, target 10mg daily. Titrate slowly every 2-4 weeks as tolerated. For hypertension: metoprolol tartrate 25-100mg BID or metoprolol succinate 25-200mg daily; atenolol 25-100mg daily. For post-MI: metoprolol tartrate 25-50mg BID, titrate to 100mg BID. For atrial fibrillation rate control: metoprolol tartrate 25-50mg q6h PRN or scheduled. Monitor heart rate (target 55-70 bpm for most indications), blood pressure, and signs of heart failure exacerbation during titration. Reduce dose or hold if HR <50 bpm, SBP <90 mmHg, or worsening heart failure symptoms. Avoid in acute decompensated heart failure until stabilized.
